compute.cost_note: network-bound; S3 list_objects_v2 pagination plus one get per extracted-text key

do_not_use_when: near-duplicate campaign text must be removed (v1 does exact-hash dedup only)

inputs.target: the public Mirrulations AWS Open Data S3 bucket (anonymous access)

purpose: acquire substantive regulatory comments from the Mirrulations S3 mirror into the regulatory_comment impostor pool (the population baseline argmove_profile profiles).
use_when: building the regulatory_comment population baseline from pre-extracted comment-attachment text in the public Mirrulations bucket
